faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Far Rockaway homes?
faqs.answer: Far Rockaway's coastal location creates high humidity levels year-round, which silverfish need to survive. The area's older homes and proximity to the ocean provide perfect conditions for these moisture-loving pests. Basements, bathrooms, and poorly ventilated spaces in Far Rockaway properties are especially vulnerable to silverfish infestations.
